@@ -18,634 +18,55 @@
 ort 
-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc isBalanced(s string) bool %7B%0A%09stack := %5B%5Drune%7B%7D%0A%0A%09for _, char := range s %7B%0A%09%09switch char %7B%0A%09%09case '(', '%5B':%0A%09%09%09stack = append(stack, char)%0A%0A%09%09case ')', '%5D':%0A%09%09%09if len(stack) == 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09%09return false%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09top := stack%5Blen(stack)-1%5D%0A%09%09%09stack = stack%5B:len(stack)-1%5D%0A%0A%09%09%09if (char == ')' && top != '(') %7C%7C (char == '%5D' && top != '%5B') %7B%0A%09%09%09%09return false%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09return len(stack) == 0%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%09if scanner.Scan() %7B%0A%09%09input := scanner.Text()%0A%09%09if isBalanced(input) %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Println(%22balanceado%22)%0A%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Println(%22nao balanceado %22)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D
+%22fmt%22%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09fmt.Println(%22balanceado%22)
 %0A%0A%7D%0A
